issues.detail: The skill does not cover all potential error scenarios such as network failures, index mapping errors, or rate limiting, limiting robustness.
The skill contains explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity, leading to verbosity.
While code snippets are provided, the instructions lack step-by-step actionable procedures for setting up the environment and executing the steps.
The skill references Node.js/Python examples and assumes specific runtime environments, limiting portability across all AI agents.

scenarios.name: es-blog-index-mapping
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a basic text/keyword mapping with no autocomplete; treatment boosted title 3-5x, mapped author/tags as keyword, added a suggest field of type completion, and applied the documented content_analyzer with lowercase, synonym, and edge_ngram filters.

scenarios.name: algolia-ecommerce-config
scenarios.rationale: Baseline set searchableAttributes/attributesForFaceting/customRanking but omitted filterOnly() and typo tuning; treatment called setSettings with prioritized searchableAttributes, filterOnly(price_cents) in facets, desc()-wrapped customRanking, and minWordSizefor1Typo: 3.
